---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem
What problem does this feature solve? Who is the user? What are they trying to do?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the feature you would like. If it is a new MCP tool, list the inputs, outputs, and error cases.

## Alternatives Considered
Other approaches you considered and why you rejected them.

## Scope
- [ ] New MCP tool
- [ ] New REST endpoint
- [ ] New supported file format
- [ ] New extraction / chunking strategy
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Security hardening
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other:

## Additional Context
Links to specs, related issues, or external documentation.
